# 📝 Template: Feature Acceptance Criteria

**Feature Name:** [Feature Title]
**Related Issue:** #[Issue Number]
**Implementation Owner:** [Jules0X]

## 1. Functional Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] **Core Logic:** [Requirement 1 - e.g., "Correctly calculates EMA cross signals."]
- [ ] **Edge Cases:** [Requirement 2 - e.g., "Handles zero volume bars without crashing."]
- [ ] **Configuration:** [Requirement 3 - e.g., "Parameters are configurable via .env."]

## 2. Technical & Quality Gates
- [ ] **Test Coverage:** All new logic covered by unit tests (Target: 90%+).
- [ ] **Type Safety:** `mypy src/` returns zero errors for the new module.
- [ ] **Linting:** `ruff check .` returns zero errors.
- [ ] **Performance:** Inference/Calculation latency is within SLO targets (< 10ms P50).

## 3. Operational Readiness
- [ ] **Logging:** Operational events logged via `structlog` with appropriate levels.
- [ ] **Observability:** New metrics added to Prometheus exporter (if applicable).
- [ ] **Audit Trail:** Critical state changes recorded in `AuditLogger`.
- [ ] **Documentation:** `docs/features/[feature].md` created or updated.

## 4. Safety & Risk
- [ ] **Risk Assessment:** [Low/Medium/High] - [Justification]
- [ ] **Rollback Plan:** [Description of how to revert this feature if it fails in production.]
- [ ] **Circuit Breakers:** [Description of any automated halts triggered by this feature.]

---
*Generated by Jules05 — Ensuring "Done" is objective.*
